title: Stop slipping in Solo using Pure Planner

messages.content: # Are you in solo mode and your car is slipping and has no grip? Follow this guide!

# Method 1
> To disable rain physics, open the game > open the weather fx debug app > open rain fx debug and override thickness to 0.0mm

# Method 2
> Enable **Extended Physics** by going to Content Manager > Single > Quick > Use Extended Physics
